content_body: This incredible week went by so fast! The cabin is beautiful and the views outside are incredible. It was great to be able to wake up in the morning and sit out on the porch and hear the river. The town of Blue Ridge was a delight and they have great coffee at the Beanery! We would love to return during the summer so we can tube and kayak down that beautiful river. Hiking up to see the Fall Branch Falls was also enjoyable with lots of opportunities to take great pictures! We hope to be back.
title: Incredible Getaway to the North Georgia Mountains
